_about: Pinned Pleiades representative points [lat, lon] for the Greek-epigraphy find-places added to the gazetteer (I.Sicily, IGCyr, IOSPE, IIP, EDH). Each was verified against the live Pleiades JSON endpoint on the date below (name correspondence + region sanity, and distance < 6 km from the corpus's own coordinate where one is carried). 'scripts/check_gazetteer.py --offline' checks the stored gazetteer coordinate against these pins with the same >6 km drift rule, so a later edit that moves a coordinate away from its verified point fails offline in CI; the default (network) run re-fetches these points from Pleiades weekly. Chersonesos and Cherson are the same physical site (Pleiades 226564), so they share one pin.
